comment.body:
depends on the levels. upward it is more like momentum...
centroid is more like a checkpoint pivot, proves or disproves a certain momentum, not necessary rejecting.
but if the market is too algodriven, it can have some 'pinning' like effect (that is not a real pin) bcs thats the centroid
